mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT t1.* FROM timetable_rehearsal t1, timetable_rehearsal t2 WHERE (t1.class_no = t2.class_no OR t1.teacher_no = t2.teacher_no OR t1.room_no = t2.room_no) -- 同个体 AND (t1.timeslot = t2.timeslot AND (t1.start_week<=t2.end_week AND t2.start_week<= t1.end_week) AND t1.biweekly+t2.biweekly != 3) -- 同时 AND t1.id != t2.id -- 不同任务 AND t1.id = #{id}
